response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional software engineering capabilities and 15+ years of diverse experience, he lacks a critical required qualification: native-level Japanese language proficiency. Beyond this disqualifying factor, his recent career has focused on web and backend development (TypeScript, Node.js) rather than embedded security firmware. His C experience dates to 2014-2015, and the resume shows no evidence of security-specific work in embedded networking, networking protocols (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP), or Linux kernel vulnerability research—all central to the role.
strengths: Extensive 15+ year track record of versatile software development across web, embedded, and infrastructure domains
Demonstrated expertise in C/C++ and Linux systems during tenure at National Instruments
Strong background in DevOps, infrastructure, and building robust development environments that supports mid-senior technical responsibilities
concerns: Native-level Japanese language proficiency is a stated required qualification and is completely absent from resume
Recent 5 years of career focused on web/backend technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React) rather than embedded firmware or security work
No evidence of experience with required security technologies (MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, encryption key exchange) or networking protocols (NETCONF, SNMP, Layer-2/3 switch operations)

key_factors.factor: Career trajectory away from embedded systems and security
